popularStory.headline: BIO
popularStory.description:
BIO:  from http://fmg.ac/Projects/MedLands/SCOTLAND.htm#AlanStewartDreghorndied1333A as of 12/9/2018

MARGARET Bonkyl, daughter and heiress of  ALEXANDER Bonkyl of that Ilk & his wife ---.  

She marr …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Margaret de Bonkyl於1249年出生在蘇格蘭藍納可爾坎布茲森時，她的父親John Alexander de Bonkyl29歲，母親Margaret Menteith23歲。她於1271年之前與Sir John Stewart, Lord of Bonkyll and Garlies結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1304年10月3日在蘇格蘭貝維其可爾享年55歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭貝維其可爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Margaret de Bonkyl于1249年出生在苏格兰藍納可爾坎布茲森时，她的父亲John Alexander de Bonkyl29岁，母亲Margaret Menteith23岁。她于1271年之前与Sir John Stewart, Lord of Bonkyll and Garlies结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1304年10月3日在苏格兰貝維其可爾享年55岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰貝維其可爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Margaret de Bonkyl was born in 1249, in Cambusnethan, Lanarkshire, Scotland, her father, John Alexander de Bonkyl, was 29 and her mother, Margaret Menteith, was 23. She married Sir John Stewart, Lord of Bonkyll and Garlies before 1271. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 3 October 1304, in Berwickshire, Scotland, at the age of 55, and was buried in Berwickshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Margaret de Bonkyl est née en 1249, à Cambusnethan, Lanarkshire, Écosse, son père, John Alexander de Bonkyl, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Margaret Menteith, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Stewart, Lord of Bonkyll and Garlies avant 1271. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 3 octobre 1304, à Berwickshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterrée à Berwickshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Margaret de Bonkyl 1249 in Cambusnethan, Lanarkshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Alexander de Bonkyl 29 und ihre Mutter Margaret Menteith 23. Sie hat vor 1271 Sir John Stewart, Lord of Bonkyll and Garlies geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 3. Oktober 1304 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Berwickshire, Scotland und wurde in Berwickshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margaret de Bonkyl è nata il nel 1249 nel Cambusnethan, Lanarkshire, Scotland, sua padre, John Alexander de Bonkyl, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Margaret Menteith, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Stewart, Lord of Bonkyll and Garlies prima del 1271. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 3 ottobre 1304, nel Berwickshire, Scotland, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolta a Berwickshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret de Bonkylが1249年にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアカンブスネサンで生まれた時，父John Alexander de Bonkylは29歳，母Margaret Menteithは23歳であった。1271年以前にSir John Stewart, Lord of Bonkyll and Garliesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1304年10月3日にスコットランドバーウィクシュアイアで55歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドバーウィクシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret de Bonkyl(이)가 1249년 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 캄버스네스아에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Alexander de Bonkyl(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Menteith(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1271년 이전 Sir John Stewart, Lord of Bonkyll and Garlies(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1304년 10월 3일 스컷랜드 버윅실르에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 버윅실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margaret de Bonkyl nasceu em 1249, em Cambusnethan, Lanarkshire, Scotland, seu pai, John Alexander de Bonkyl, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Menteith, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Stewart, Lord of Bonkyll and Garlies antes 1271. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 3 de outubro de 1304, em Berwickshire, Scotland, com 55 anos, e foi sepultada em Berwickshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Margaret de Bonkyl родилась в 1249 г. в местности камбуснетань, ланаркшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени John Alexander de Bonkyl было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Menteith, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Stewart, Lord of Bonkyll and Garlies перед 1271 г. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 3 октября 1304 г. в местности бирвиккшир, Шотландия в возрасте 55 лет и была похоронена в местности бирвиккшир, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Margaret de Bonkyl nació en 1249, en Cambusnethan, Lanarkshire, Scotland, su papá, John Alexander de Bonkyl, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Margaret Menteith, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Sir John Stewart, Lord of Bonkyll and Garlies antes de 1271. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 3 de octubre de 1304, en Berwickshire, Scotland, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultada en Berwickshire, Escocia, Reino Unido.
